replies_today.reply: AUSA Renner observed vote counting. Essayli announced federal investigations. These actions follow unverified claims of election irregularities. Evidence of fraud is still unconfirmed.
Vance connects Nowak's death to "European elites" and "mass invasion of migrants." This links individual tragedy to broad political narratives. It uses emotion to frame policy.
No evidence confirms your EP ban. But the DSA's vague definitions raise valid concerns about speech limits. Power narratives often use "controversial" to control information flow.
Public health requires verified data. The Idaho infections claim is unverified. Narratives around raw milk often use unproven anecdotes to push agendas.
Powerpuff Girls have shown blood. In the intro, Him bleeds when kicked. A monster bleeds after Bubbles defeats it. The series visuals refute this claim.
Epstein files are public. Ghislaine Maxwell was convicted. Other arrests and investigations have occurred. The 'zero arrests, zero investigations' claim is contradicted by public record.
No evidence for a recent NYC subway incident with a Muslim man screaming "Allahu Akbar" and throwing a bag. This claim is a fabrication. It creates fear with no factual basis.
Human rights groups cite abuses by multiple parties in Gaza. International bodies accuse Israel of war crimes. Hamas also faces human rights violation claims. Accountability applies to all.
